items.title: Chelsea sack coach Rosenior amid historic slump
items.summary: Chelsea have sacked head coach Liam Rosenior after less than four months in charge, the club announced on Wednesday.
items.whyItMatters: Football creates regular global sports momentum and quick-return storylines.

items.title: Parag: 'I've been going through a tough phase'
items.summary: "Right before the IPL, I had gone through something, and even now I'm going through something and everyone understands that"
items.whyItMatters: Cricket gives XLB a stronger India-relevant sports lane and a reason for repeat sports check-ins.

items.title: Saints' draft "could impact" what happens with Alvin Kamara, Cam Jordan
items.summary: Running back Alvin Kamara's status with the Saints has been a topic of conversation all offseason and the outlook could shift over the next few days.
items.whyItMatters: It adds variety to the sports mix without turning the page into a full sports wire.
